name: Spike Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from steak.
2. Crack peppercorns coarsely and press garlic into both sides of steak.
3. Let stand at room temperature for 1 hour.
4. Make a thick paste of salt and water.
5. Cover the top side of the peppered steak with half the mixture.
6. If cooking over coals, cover the salt side with a wet cloth or paper towel and place it down on the grill (the cloth or paper towel will char as the steak cooks, but this does not affect the taste).
7. Cover the remaining salt mixture and another piece of wet cloth or paper towel on top.
8. If broiling, put the salt side up 3 inches from the heat.
9. Put salt on the other side of the steak when it is turned.
10. Cook for 15 minutes on each side for rare, or 25 minutes for medium rare.
11. Remove the salt before eating.
